examples: The weasel population also increased, following the growth of the chipmunk population.
We thought that Jairo was a very clever chipmunk.
The boy stood motionless, like a mouse or a chipmunk when it knows you're watching.
Rapper Chipmunk, a Sony artist, complained that "fans don't understand" On Air, On Sale.
Her winningly chipmunk-cheeked smile is doled out sparingly, a privilege to be earned, rather than an icebreaker or an entreaty.
